## Goodness of fit

{{< include _subfiles/Linear-models-overview/_sec_linreg_gof.qmd >}}

## Diagnostics {#sec-diagnose-LMs}

{{< include _subfiles/Linear-models-overview/_sec_linreg_diagnostics.qmd >}}

## Model selection

{{< include _subfiles/Linear-models-overview/_sec_linreg_model_selection.qmd >}}
